column1: He____________go to the doctor. He looks ill.
I think I am coming down with the flu. I___________take some vitamin C tablets.
We__________panic. There is still plenty of time to get there.
If you are tired, you____________get some sleep.
Tony___________lift that heavy box. He might hurt his back.
They_______________wear their scarves or they will get sore throat.
Anna_____________worry. She always does well in exams.
I_________________be nervous. I revised well for the test.
